Who We Are

The Story Built on
Belief

AMICS Football Academy was founded in 2025 by Chimbu — a footballer who saw something missing in Kannur. Not just a place to train, but a system that actually develops players. A structure that takes raw talent and turns it into something real.

From day one, the philosophy was simple: no shortcuts, no passengers. Every session is intentional. Every player is coached as an individual. The goal was never to run a football class — it was to build a legacy institution that Kannur could be proud of.

In less than a year, AMICS has trained over 142 players, represented Kannur in the National Youth I-League, and built a standard that no other local academy matches. This is just the beginning.

Discipline
Development
Excellence

Proof of Work

What We've Built Results That
Speak

In our very first year, AMICS didn't just participate — we competed, we won, and we sent players to every level of the game. These aren't promises. They're facts from 2025 alone.

2025 · Kannur
Chakolas Tournament

AMICS entered Chakolas 2025 and came out champions. A statement win in our debut competitive season — against established clubs with years of history behind them.

The AMICS System

How We Build Players Player Progression
Timeline

This isn't luck. This is structure. See how AMICS turns a raw prospect into a competitive footballer — step by step.

Ambadi
Midfielder  ·  AMICS FA
Featured Journey
Early 2025
Joins AMICS Academy
Ambadi walks onto the AMICS ground as a raw prospect — good instincts, unstructured technique. From day one, he trains under an AFC-licensed system built to develop players the right way.
Foundation Phase
Mid 2025
First Competitive Appearance
Selected for the AMICS squad at the Chakolas Tournament 2025. Ambadi holds his own against older, more experienced players — earning the trust of the coaching staff in a championship-winning campaign.
Chakolas 2025 · Champions
Late 2025
District Recognition
His consistent performances catch the attention of selectors. Ambadi is called up for Kannur District assessment — recognition that the AMICS system is producing players the wider football community notices.
Kannur District · Selected
2026 — Next
The Road Ahead
State trials. National youth competitions. The ceiling is unwritten. At AMICS, this is where every player's story is still being built — and Ambadi's is just beginning.
In Progress
What They Say

Voices From
The Ground

Real words from the parents and players who are part of the AMICS journey.

"

My son has transformed completely since joining AMICS. Not just as a footballer — as a person. The discipline here is unlike anything I've seen at other academies in Kannur.

Suresh K.
Parent · U15 Player
★★★★★
"

I joined AMICS not knowing what to expect. Within six months I was selected for the district team. The coaching here is serious, technical, and they genuinely care about where you go next.

★★★★★

What Chimbu and the staff have built here is rare. This is not a football class — it's a proper academy. My daughter comes home exhausted and proud every single day.
